name: Mintegral (Interactive & DCO Focus)
specs: Hybrid Format: Video (15-30s) + Interactive Endcard (IEC) or Full Playable Ads.
Multi-aspect Ratio: Must provide 9:16 (Vertical) and 16:9 (Horizontal) to cover massive SDK inventory.
File Size: Playables must be ultra-light (<2MB optimized, <5MB limit) for instant loading.
Tracking: Milestone events (e.g., interaction_start, level_1_complete, cta_click) to feed the algorithm.

creative_logic.The_Switch: The transition from 'Watching' to 'Playing' must be seamless. Use a 'Hand Icon' or 'Pointer' to prompt the first click at 3s-5s.
creative_logic.DCO_Strategy: Modular design. Different 'Hooks' (Video) paired with the same 'Core Play' (IEC) to test best-performing combinations.
creative_logic.Progression: The playable must show a 'Power Up' or 'Win State' within 10 seconds to trigger a dopamine hit.

psychological_hooks: The 'Tutorial Trap': A very simple puzzle that looks slightly challenging. Once the user clicks, they are 50% more likely to install (Endowment Effect).
The 'Incomplete Task': Show a building half-built or a puzzle 90% solved. People have a natural urge to finish it.
The 'Reward Reinforcement': After the interactive part, show a huge 'Congratulations! Claim your bonus in-game' to align with the rewarded-video mindset.
preferred_audio: Tactile SFX (Clicking, popping, sliding) that provides haptic-like feedback. Background music should be looping and non-intrusive.
focus: IVR (Interactive View Rate) > CVR (Conversion Rate) > LTV (Long-term Value)
